selected_question.question: Will global net carbon emissions reach net zero before 2050 through current or emerging technologies and policies?
selected_question.why_it_matters: Achieving net zero is critical to limit catastrophic climate impacts and guide investment and policy decisions.
signals_to_watch: adoption rates of clean energy technologies

selected_score.rationale: Net zero emissions critical for climate; uncertainty moderate due to policy and tech factors; highly actionable for policy and investment; less novel but vital; falsifiable by emission data.

all_scores.rationale: Autonomous AI scientific breakthroughs would revolutionize research; medium uncertainty due to rapid AI progress; actionable for research funding and policy; novel in scale and autonomy; falsifiable by tracking AI scientific outputs.

Practical quantum advantage would disrupt multiple fields; uncertainty moderate due to technical challenges; actionable for infrastructure and security planning; novel technological milestone; falsifiable by demonstration of error-corrected quantum advantage.

Nuclear conflict has catastrophic global impact; uncertainty moderate due to geopolitical complexity; limited direct actionability but critical for policy; less novel but highly consequential; falsifiable by occurrence or non-occurrence within timeframe.

DAO replacing government functions would transform governance; uncertainty moderate given legal and social barriers; actionable for legal and political reforms; novel governance model; falsifiable by legal and functional adoption.

AI-driven job loss impacts economy and society; uncertainty moderate due to economic complexity; actionable for policy and labor market interventions; moderately novel at scale; falsifiable by employment data trends.

Gene editing cures would transform healthcare; uncertainty moderate due to clinical and regulatory hurdles; actionable for medical research and healthcare policy; novel therapeutic milestone; falsifiable by clinical outcomes.
Net zero emissions critical for climate; uncertainty moderate due to policy and tech factors; highly actionable for policy and investment; less novel but vital; falsifiable by emission data.
VR as primary social medium would reshape culture; uncertainty high due to adoption and tech limits; actionable for media and tech sectors; novel social phenomenon; falsifiable by usage data.
